pi_items.source: Consistent across task.json (line 5), setup_task.sh (line 10), and export_result.sh (line 5)
Task description (line 3) and verifier.py (line 84) both specify center at (200, 200)
Task description (lines 5-7) and verifier.py (lines 86-88) specify these exact radii with ±2 tolerance
Task description (lines 3-5) and verifier.py (lines 62-70) verify these layer names
Verifier.py lines 46-50: File existence and DXF validity check awards 10 points
Verifier.py lines 59-70: Layer existence check (5 points per layer, 2 layers = 10 max)
Verifier.py lines 72-96: Up to 3 circles × 10 points each = 30 maximum
Verifier.py lines 98-136: min(20, directions_found * 5) with 4 directions max = 20 points maximum
Verifier.py lines 138-145: layer_score = 0; +5 if circles on correct layer; +5 if lines on correct layer. Maximum = 10 points, NOT 20
Verifier.py lines 147-158: min(10, labels_found * 3.4) = 10 points maximum

pi_items.verified_value: LibreCAD 2D CAD software with DXF support
pi_items.source: Task description and scripts reference LibreCAD; install_librecad.sh installs librecad package; export_result.sh uses ezdxf library for DXF parsing
Output path ends with .dxf; ezdxf library explicitly parses DXF format; DXF is a standard format for CAD drawings
install_librecad.sh lines 37-38 downloads a floorplan.dxf; verified the URL exists and returns real architectural drawing

privileged_info_summary: Task creates synthetic irrigation system geometry (concentric circles at center (200,200) with radii 50, 100, 150 and four radial lines in cardinal directions) in LibreCAD and exports as DXF file. Uses real software (LibreCAD) and real file format (DXF) with ezdxf Python library for analysis. Scoring metadata claims 20 points for 'layer_assignment' but verifier implementation only awards maximum 10 points for this criterion (5 for circles on correct layer + 5 for lines on correct layer).
